/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++11 -O2 -march=native  -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ndarray_backend_cuda.dir/link.d -shared  -o /home/jyh/dlsyscourse/hw3/python/needle/backend_ndarray/ndarray_backend_cuda.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/ndarray_backend_cuda.dir/src/ndarray_backend_cuda_generated_ndarray_backend_cuda.cu.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so
